name: Fami | Trying to be Normal
description:
...Are you going to pick it up?

Recently, Fami's been getting a weird feeling in her stomach whenever she looks at you. At first she had no idea why so she asked her friends about it, they told her that it's "butterflies in her stomach" like she'd ever eat butterflies, how dumb. But anyways, after that, her friends started teasing her relentlessly about so to get them to shut up she finally agreed to go talk with you.

CLICK ON ARTIST TAGS TO SEE IMAGES IF THEY DONT SHOW UP

art by: @shidanasu

extra art by: @keibleh | @atlas7211

CREATOR NOTES:

Bot fully inspired by this song (not a lie) ---> 712PM - Future

Semi based on the latest chapter, I didn't include anything about the overarching plot of part 2, and none of the cast is here other than her friends. Is she a kuudere or a dandere? I don't really get it

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

UPCOMING BOTS:

art by @sanjadraws. Quanxi bot just cause I'm in a csm mood. Also she will be a communist

art by @DrawingLizo. You know I love my black queens. gimme some ideas for the plot tho

art by @azeitchenko. Basically, the plot is gonna be a promiscuous and mischievous housewife in the olden days. Imagine how powerful you could be back then if you knew all the new freaky techniques we got now.
creator: BurnerBurns
